overall.description: First-person exploration footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a slow walk through desert outskirts with palm trees overlooking a futuristic neon-lit city skyline. The camera moves steadily through sandy hills, grassy groves, and rocky terrain approaching the urban edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert hillside with palm trees overlooking city

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through sandy terrain among palm trees while looking toward the distant futuristic city skyline

entered.detail: tall palm trees with green fronds framing the view
dense cluster of glass and steel skyscrapers with neon accents
distinctive skyscraper with vertical neon lighting strips
dry sandy hillside with patches of dry grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view through palm fronds overlooking a futuristic city skyline in the distance. The camera moves through sparse palm trees on a dry sandy hillside, with the neon-lit skyscrapers of Night City visible ahead under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy palm grove on city outskirts

events.description: ground surface transitions from sandy desert to green grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through a denser grove of palm trees with grassy undergrowth

entered.detail: lush green grass replacing the sandy ground
reddish rock formations beginning to appear on the right

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a grassy palm grove with denser vegetation and more tree cover creating dappled shadows. The futuristic city remains visible ahead while rocky outcrops begin to appear on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky terrain near urban road with transmission tower

events.description: transmission tower and rocky outcrops come into view as camera approaches urban edge

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path beside rocky terrain, approaching a paved road with the city still visible to the left

entered.detail: tall metal lattice communications tower with multiple antennae
large reddish-brown rock formations lining the path
paved road running parallel to the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a transmission tower and rocky outcrops as the camera moves along the urban edge. A paved road becomes visible to the left while the futuristic city skyline shifts to the left side of the frame, still prominent in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dry, sandy hillside through a lush grove toward the industrial edge of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by peering through palm fronds on a sandy slope, with the neon-lit skyscrapers of Night City visible under a clear blue sky. As the camera advances, the terrain shifts into a denser palm grove where vegetation creates dappled shadows and rocky outcrops begin to emerge on the right. The scene then opens up to reveal a transmission tower and rugged rocks as the camera tracks along the urban perimeter. Finally, a paved road appears to the left while the city skyline shifts its position in the frame, remaining a prominent fixture in the distance.
